feat.name: River Adaptation
feat.text: Webbing sprouts on your legs and tail as you shift to a more aquatic form. You can cast *feet to fins* as an innate divine spell once per day. This innate magic relies on your makari heritage, limiting the effect to yourself but allowing you to cast it more easily than a common mage; you can target only yourself with the spell, but you can Cast the Spell as a free action if you’re within a body of water when you cast it.

traits.name: Lizardfolk
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the lizardfolk ancestry, a family of reptilian humanoids. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by lizardfolk.
